code:
fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> String
  mut msgs = ""
  mut count = 0
  if name == ""
    msgs = "empty-name"
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age < 0
    if count > 0
      msgs = "#{msgs},negative-age"
    else
      msgs = "negative-age"
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age > 150
    if count > 0
      msgs = "#{msgs},too-old"
    else
      msgs = "too-old"
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  if count == 0
    "ok"
  else
    "errors=#{msgs}"
  end
end

println(validate("", -5))
println(validate("Alice", 30))
println(validate("Bob", 200))
